positive: Stylized, high-contrast graphic illustration of a whimsical forest scene: massive, stylized mushrooms with bioluminescent edges, abstract glowing fox paw prints leading through tangled roots, and stylized, geometrically shaped ferns. The composition should be central and balanced, perfect for a repeat pattern or single large graphic print on apparel. Use a deep indigo and forest green color palette accented by electric cyan luminescence and creamy yellow highlights. Style: Modern vector art, engraved woodcut texture, thick clean lines, crisp edges, suitable for screen printing. Lighting: Dramatic, focused backlighting from the glowing elements, creating deep shadows and strong contrast. Minimalist, ethereal, joyful, magical.
negative: blur, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distracting background, grainy
